title: derris microphylla
intro: Derris microphylla, also known as the Kola nut tree, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant is a source of rotenone, a natural insecticide, and has been used for its medicinal and herbal properties. The medicinal properties of Derris microphylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. The plant is often prepared in herbal tea or as a powder for use in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its health benefits in treating various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
